heading: Promotions (discount codes)
intro: Reusable discount codes applied garage-side on a job. Fixed £ is a whole-job discount (inc-VAT); a percentage targets selected products and only discounts those.
label: Label
targetsHint: The discount applies only to these products when they’re on a job.
noProducts: No products yet — add some above.
confirmDelete: Delete promo {{code}}? This can’t be undone.
